title: OpenSearch Dashboards Dashboard Saved Object v1
description: Schema for a dashboard saved object, representing a collection of visualization panels with layout, time range, and query configuration.

version.description: Saved object schema version for migration tracking.

panelsJSON.description: JSON-serialized array of dashboard panel objects. When parsed, conforms to the panelsArray schema.

optionsJSON.description: JSON-serialized dashboard display options. When parsed, conforms to the dashboardOptions schema.

timeFrom.description: Start of the saved time range (e.g. 'now-15m', absolute ISO datetime).

timeTo.description: End of the saved time range (e.g. 'now', absolute ISO datetime).

timeRestore.description: Whether to restore the saved time range when the dashboard is opened.

panelsArray.description: Array of panel objects representing embeddables on the dashboard.

panel.description: A single panel on the dashboard, representing an embeddable visualization, search, or other content.

panelIndex.description: Unique identifier for this panel within the dashboard. Must match gridData.i.

id.description: Saved object ID of the backing saved object. Optional for by-value embeddables.

embeddableConfig.description: Configuration object passed directly to the embeddable. Schema depends on the panel type.

version.description: Version of OpenSearch Dashboards that created this panel.

title.description: Custom title override for the panel. If omitted, the embeddable's own title is used.

panelRefName.description: Reference name linking this panel to an entry in the top-level references array.

dashboardOptions.description: Display and layout options for the dashboard.

useMargins.description: Whether to display margins between panels.

hidePanelTitles.description: Whether to hide all panel titles on the dashboard.
